#@ opts.style=diff3
#@ opts.label.ours=file.txt
#@ opts.label.base=file.txt
#@ opts.label.theirs=file.txt
#@ expect.clean=false
#@ expect.conflict_count=1
<<<<<<< file.txt
This file
does, too.
||||||| file.txt
This file has
CRLF line endings.
=======
And so does
this one.
>>>>>>> file.txt
